user.title: Add an RF fan
user.description:
Name your fan and choose the Broadlink to transmit through. Set how many speeds it has, and optionally add a light or any extra buttons (Timer, Breeze, …). You'll learn each one next.

Tip: when learning speeds, press whichever button actually runs the fan at that speed — some remotes are mislabeled.

data.name: Fan name
data.has_on_button: Remote has a separate On button
data.direct_capture: Skip the frequency sweep (try this if a fan won't detect)
data.custom_buttons: Extra buttons (one per line, or comma-separated)

learn_press.title: Release, then press again
learn_press.description: Locked onto the **{button}** button's signal. Let go of it now. Then select **Submit** and press **{button}** once more to capture the code.

learn_result.title: Captured
learn_result.description: Got {pulses} pulses for the **{button}** button. Send it to the fan to test, keep it, or try again.

learn_error.title: Nothing captured
learn_error.description: No code came through for the **{button}** button ({error}). Try again, or capture without the frequency sweep — that works for remotes the sweep can't lock onto (just one press at the set frequency).

progress.sweep: Press and hold the **{button}** button on your remote, and keep holding until the next screen appears.
progress.capture: Now press the **{button}** button once to capture it.
progress.press: Press the **{button}** button on your remote once now to capture it.

abort.no_rf_device: No RF-capable Broadlink device found. Set up your RM4 Pro (or similar) in the Broadlink integration first.

relearn.title: Re-learn a button
relearn.description: Pick the button to re-learn. Tip: learn each speed by the speed it actually runs at on the fan, not the label on the remote.

add.title: Add a button
add.description: Name the new button (e.g. Timer, Breeze). You'll learn it next; it becomes its own button entity.

learn_press.title: Release, then press again
learn_press.description: Locked onto the **{button}** button's signal. Let go of it now. Then select **Submit** and press **{button}** once more to capture the code.

learn_result.title: Captured
learn_result.description: Got {pulses} pulses for the **{button}** button. Send it to the fan to test, keep it, or try again.

learn_error.title: Nothing captured
learn_error.description: No code came through for the **{button}** button ({error}). Try again, or capture without the frequency sweep — that works for remotes the sweep can't lock onto (just one press at the set frequency).

progress.sweep: Press and hold the **{button}** button on your remote, and keep holding until the next screen appears.
progress.capture: Now press the **{button}** button once to capture it.
progress.press: Press the **{button}** button on your remote once now to capture it.

abort.no_rf_device: No RF-capable Broadlink device found. Make sure your Broadlink is online.
